SPY.Last.txt data file parsed - highest closing price on 2023-12-28 was 476.69 (open 476.88, high 477.55, low 476.26, close 476.69). Searched price data from line containing '20231228;476.88;477.55;476.26;476.69;77158100' and verified to be the maximum close price across all 2023 trading days.

privileged_info_summary: The task claims SPY's 2023 annual high closing price was 465.18 on December 28, 2023. However, analysis of the SPY.Last.txt data file (used by the environment to import into NinjaTrader) reveals the actual highest closing price in 2023 was 476.69, also on December 28, 2023. The date (2023-12-28) is correct - this was indeed the date of the 2023 annual closing high - but the expected_price value is contradicted by 11.51 points (476.69 - 465.18 = 11.51), which far exceeds the 0.50 tolerance specified in the metadata.
